evidence_summary: Establish the immense scale of a two hundred and fifty chariot caravan traversing an isolated, trackless sea bottom. The visual language must emphasize the eerie silence and the vastness of the ochre moss expanse to drive a sense of isolation.

The massive caravan, consisting of two hundred and fifty chariots, moves in eerie silence across the trackless, ochre-colored moss of the sea bottom. The setting emphasizes the isolation and the strange, silent nature of Martian travel.
Wide view of a silent, moving line of chariots on an endless ochre plain.
The caravan recedes into the distance, leaving no visible tracks in the moss.
The rhythmic, silent progression of the massive retinue across the sea bottom.
